# AMError.Code.conversionNotPossibleError

**Case**

An error that occurs when the converter determines that it is unable to convert from one data type to another.

## Declaration

```swift
case conversionNotPossibleError
```

## Discussion

This error isn’t displayed to the user.

## Data Conversion Errors

- **AMError.Code.conversionFailedError**: An error that occurs when, for example, the converter encounters an error converting data from one type to another.
- **AMError.Code.conversionNoDataError**: An error that occurs when the converter determines that the conversion, though possible, would produce a nil result.
